top_signals.title: Lagarde Won’t Exclude Early ECB Exit to Enter French Politics
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said she won’t rule out leaving her current position early to participate in French politics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan’s 2026 Wage Talks Result in Third Year of Gains Above 5%
top_signals.summary: Japan’s annual wage negotiations concluded with average pay gains topping 5% for a third year, underscoring the economy’s resilience and reinforcing the Bank of Japan’s stance to keep raising interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Exclusive | JPMorgan, Citi and Big Banks Plan New Tokenized Deposit System to Answer Crypto - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Exclusive | JPMorgan, Citi and Big Banks Plan New Tokenized Deposit System to Answer Crypto  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Claude Fable 5 isn’t permanently leaving subscriptions, Anthropic says
top_signals.summary: Anthropic says Claude Fable 5 won't be accessible via Claude subscriptions after July 7, but it's not a permanent change, and the company expects the model to return outside the usage-based plan soon. [...]
